nasb.text: So they stationed the people, all the army that was on the north side of the city, and its rear guard on the west side of the city, and Joshua spent that night in the midst of the valley.

esv.text: So they stationed the forces, the main encampment that was north of the city and its rear guard west of the city. But Joshua spent that night in the valley.

cnv.text: 於是他們把眾民，就是在城北的全軍和在城西的伏兵都布置好了。那一夜，約書亞走進了山谷之中。

ccb.text: 于是，城北的主力军队和城西的伏兵都部署好了。当晚，约书亚在山谷里过夜。
